욥기 19:2.content: “How long will you torment me, and crush me with words?

욥기 19:3.content: You have reproached me ten times. You aren’t ashamed that you attack me.

욥기 19:4.content: If it is true that I have erred, my error remains with myself.

욥기 19:5.content: If indeed you will magnify yourselves against me, and plead against me my reproach,

욥기 19:6.content: know now that God has subverted me, and has surrounded me with his net.

욥기 19:7.content: “Behold, I cry out of wrong, but I am not heard. I cry for help, but there is no justice.

욥기 19:8.content: He has walled up my way so that I can’t pass, and has set darkness in my paths.

욥기 19:9.content: He has stripped me of my glory, and taken the crown from my head.

욥기 19:10.content: He has broken me down on every side, and I am gone. He has plucked my hope up like a tree.

욥기 19:11.content: He has also kindled his wrath against me. He counts me among his adversaries.

욥기 19:12.content: His troops come on together, build a siege ramp against me, and encamp around my tent.

욥기 19:13.content: “He has put my brothers far from me. My acquaintances are wholly estranged from me.

욥기 19:14.content: My relatives have gone away. My familiar friends have forgotten me.

욥기 19:15.content: Those who dwell in my house and my maids consider me a stranger. I am an alien in their sight.

욥기 19:16.content: I call to my servant, and he gives me no answer. I beg him with my mouth.

욥기 19:17.content: My breath is offensive to my wife. I am loathsome to the children of my own mother.

욥기 19:18.content: Even young children despise me. If I arise, they speak against me.

욥기 19:19.content: All my familiar friends abhor me. They whom I loved have turned against me.

욥기 19:20.content: My bones stick to my skin and to my flesh. I have escaped by the skin of my teeth.

욥기 19:21.content: “Have pity on me. Have pity on me, you my friends; for the hand of God has touched me.

욥기 19:22.content: Why do you persecute me as God, and are not satisfied with my flesh?

욥기 19:23.content: “Oh that my words were now written! Oh that they were inscribed in a book!

욥기 19:24.content: That with an iron pen and lead they were engraved in the rock forever!

욥기 19:25.content: But as for me, I know that my Redeemer lives. In the end, he will stand upon the earth.

욥기 19:26.content: After my skin is destroyed, then I will see God in my flesh,

욥기 19:27.content: whom I, even I, will see on my side. My eyes will see, and not as a stranger. “My heart is consumed within me.

욥기 19:28.content: If you say, ‘How we will persecute him!’ because the root of the matter is found in me,

욥기 19:29.content: be afraid of the sword, for wrath brings the punishments of the sword, that you may know there is a judgment.”
